title: Sewing Pattern 2253 PDF
short_description: This skirt has a shaped waistband and side closure side is hidden in the ironed pleat. The slit is marked by overstitching.
pattern_info: Fabric required: about mt. 0.80 – mt. 1.40 wide. Available in sizes 42, 46, 50, 54 (all sizes included). Downloadable PDF pattern. Net (no seam allowances/hem). No step-by-step sewing instructions. Multi-sized in one file.
raw_text:
Fabric required: about mt. 0.80 – mt. 1.40 wide.
Available in sizes 42, 46, 50, 54. All sizes included.
Downloadable PDF pattern →
This skirt has a shaped waistband and side closure side is hidden in the ironed pleat. The slit is marked by overstitching. Jacket n. 2252. Blouse n. 2254.
Download instructions to print, cut and join the pattern here, or you can watch the video!
Marfy Pdf digital patterns
They are downloadable immediately and without shipping costs.
They are net, i.e., without seam allowances and hems.
They do not include step-by-step sewing instructions.
They are in five languages (Italian, English, French, Spanish, German) with all necessary instructions, notches and letters to compose the pattern.
They are multi-sized: sizes are all included in one file.
